100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On March 27, 1926, the world was abuzz with news of the ongoing political tensions in Germany, where the rise of extremist parties was raising concerns about stability. In the United States, the stock market showed signs of volatility, prompting discussions about the economic future. Meanwhile, in Egypt, nationalist sentiments were escalating as protests against British rule intensified, reflecting a growing demand for independence.
